class.name: EFSWListener
class.brief_description: A wrapper class for FileWatchListener in [url=https://github.com/SpartanJ/efsw/]efsw[/url].
class.description:
Listen for file and directory change events and react to them. Here is a simple example: [codeblock] class_name CustomListener extends EFSWListener
const ACTION_NAMES = ["Add", "Delete", "Modified", "Moved"]
func _file_action_handle(watch_id: int, directory: String, filename: String, is_dir: bool, action: FileAction, old_filename: String) -> void: # Simply output the detected file actions. prints("watch id: %d, dir: %s filename: %s, is dir, %s action: %s, old_filename: %s" % [watch_id, directory, filename, is_dir, ACTION_NAMES[action-1], old_filename])
func _missed_file_actions_handle(watch_id: int, directory: String) -> void: push_error(watch_id, directory) [/codeblock]

method.name: _file_action_handle
method.description: Called when there is a file action within a directory being watched by [method EFSWWatcher.add_watch]. [b]Note:[/b] This callback will be called in a separate thread, so please ensure thread safety.

method.name: _missed_file_actions_handle
method.description: Called when file actions are lost due to buffer overflow. [b]Note:[/b] This callback will be called in a separate thread, so please ensure thread safety.

constants.constant: A file or directory is created or moved in from outside the scope.
A file or directory is deleted or moved out of scope.
A file or directory is modified.
A file or directory is moved.
